limitations: R&D figures ($8.5B–$9.9B) are total company R&D; AI-attributable share is not broken out, so ai_investment_intensity scored 4 rather than 5 — quantified spend exists but is not cleanly AI-attributable.

Risk section material is present and scored; risk disclosure references specific regulatory regimes (EU AI Act, CCPA) and specific threat mechanisms (cyberattack vectors, compliance penalties), supporting score of 4, but no quantified risk exposure or named internal governance body is cited, precluding score of 5.
